name: The Jury: Death on the Staircase
original_name: The Jury: Death on the Staircase
overview: The gripping true crime event follows a re-enactment of a real manslaughter case, presented word-for-word with actors, before a new jury of 12 everyday Australians. But will they come to the same verdict as the original trial?

trailers.title: The Jury: Death on the Staircase   SBS & SBS On Demand
